periods.name: Overnight
periods.detailed_forecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 76. Southwest wind around 7 mph.

periods.name: Friday
periods.short_forecast: Slight Chance Rain Showers then Sunny
periods.detailed_forecast: A slight chance of rain showers before 7am. Sunny, with a high near 97. Heat index values as high as 105. Southwest wind 7 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

periods.name: Friday Night
periods.detailed_forecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms between 7pm and 11pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 11pm and 1am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 75. Heat index values as high as 102. Northwest wind 5 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

periods.name: Saturday
periods.detailed_forecast: Mostly sunny, with a high near 88. Northeast wind around 8 mph.
